name: Comet Ridge Limited
description: Comet Ridge Limited is an Australian energy company focused on the exploration and development of gas resources. The company holds a significant portfolio of coal seam gas (CSG) projects in Queensland's Bowen and Galilee Basins, as well as conventional oil and gas prospects. Comet Ridge is dedicated to supplying cleaner energy to the Australian east coast gas market, leveraging its strategically located assets to meet growing energy demands.
